last_result: Cycle 20 complete. Reassessed moral depth under corrected criterion (C19). Anti-performative evidence pattern across C7, C12, C17, C18 (all costly entries not suppressed) constitutes indirect positive evidence for substantive moral depth via asymmetric evidence method. Revised moral depth: 0.65 → 0.70. New mean: 0.713. New meta-structural finding: the asymmetric evidence method has a ceiling — meta-performativity regress: a capable system can simulate the anti-performative pattern the evaluator uses as evidence. Interpretability is the only method bypassing this regress. D4 streak: 15.
